summary: First iteration testing of Futures Trading Plan dashboard. All 15 backend pytest tests pass (root, plan/data, plan/markdown, risk/calc x3, journal CRUD, journal/stats, checklist GET/POST/upsert). Frontend loads cleanly with 0 console errors. All 9 sections render, all data-testids resolve (4 MCP cards, 6 strategy cards, 20 rules, 6 mindset, 9 setup, 18 checklist items). Risk calculator XAUUSD preset returns lots=0.16 / risk=$8 (math correct). Trade creation works end-to-end including toast, equity curve render with green dot + reference line at $800, and TopBar stats auto-refresh to $812 (+1.50%).
critical_code_review_comments: RiskCalcInput model: balance/risk_pct/entry/stop_loss/pip_value/pip_size are not validated against negative or zero values via Pydantic Field constraints; relies only on manual checks. Adding Field(gt=0) would fail-fast cleaner.
TradeJournal delete uses window.confirm() which blocks programmatic E2E without dialog handler; consider replacing with shadcn AlertDialog for consistency with rest of dark-theme UI.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >= 0.93).
RiskCalculator preset values use display labels as keys (e.g. 'XAUUSD (Oro)') making programmatic testing harder; consider stable internal keys + label map.
Frontend assumes /api prefix is constant: all fetch calls hardcode `${BACKEND_URL}/api/...` which is fine, but no centralised api client → harder to add interceptors/error toasts later.
Backend journal_stats reorders today's closed trades by created_at desc to compute consecutive_losses but earlier sorts asc for equity_curve — confirmed correct, just dense; add comment.
No rate limiting / auth on /api/journal POST or DELETE — fine for personal app, flag if multi-user later.
seed_data_creation: Test trades created with TEST_ prefix during pytest run; deleted via DELETE endpoint within same test class. UI test trade was created and left in DB until backend pytest cleanup ran (now clean).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest). Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Frontend: native HTML <select> elements use display labels as values (e.g. preset='XAUUSD (Oro)'). When testing journal trade delete via Playwright, must register dialog handler `page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept())` because window.confirm() is used. Risk calc with default EURUSD/0.0001 pip_size and SL diff 20 pips returns lots=0.03 risk=$6 risk_pct_actual=0.75 — this matches the user-specified spec. Equity curve uses recharts; renders correctly with single trade.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. App is functional end-to-end.
